title: Acme Corp — supplier survey review
transcript: Jane (Acme Corp, Head of Sustainability): We got responses from 40 percent of suppliers. Some data gaps on refrigerant usage. Marcus (Acme Corp, Procurement Director): Our tier-2 suppliers are the weakest link — most don't track emissions at all. Consultant: I'll prepare a gap analysis and remediation plan by June 5. Jane: That works ahead of the board date. Consultant: We decided that for non-responding suppliers we'll use industry-average emission factors flagged with a low-confidence marker. Marcus: Agreed — that's more defensible than leaving a blank. Consultant: The broader insight here is that supplier engagement requires executive sponsorship at the buying firm to move the needle — procurement staff alone can't drive it. Jane: That's consistent with what we've seen internally.
